title: juglans regia f. monophylla
intro: Juglans regia f. monophylla, also known as the Single-leaf Walnut, is a variety of the Walnut tree (Juglans regia) that is characterized by its unique single leaf. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Juglans regia f. monophylla include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include walnut hull extract and walnut leaf tea, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
